name: Tag Case with time span
creator: 28ff3096-2a98-4634-bc6c-bb0b19eacc62
description: A Block that Tags the case with the time span between Alerts.  Can be used for Case queue filters.

parameters.name: Branches
parameters.value: [{"LogicalOperator":0,"Conditions":[{"Operator":4,"FieldName":"[Get Case Data.JsonResult| \"alerts\" | count()]","Type":2,"Value":"2","CustomOperatorName":null}],"Order":1,"IsDefaultBranch":false,"Name":"Not enough alerts"},{"LogicalOperator":0,"Conditions":[],"Order":3,"IsDefaultBranch":true,"Name":"Branch"},{"LogicalOperator":1,"Conditions":[{"Operator":0,"FieldName":"[Get Case Data.JsonResult| \"alerts.startTimeUnixTimeInMs\" | first(1)]","Type":2,"Value":"0","CustomOperatorName":null},{"Operator":0,"FieldName":"[Get Case Data.JsonResult| \"alerts.startTimeUnixTimeInMs\" | last(1)]","Type":2,"Value":"0","CustomOperatorName":null}],"Order":2,"IsDefaultBranch":false,"Name":"no MS timestamp"}]

parameters.name: NestedWorkflowOutput
parameters.value: Only 1 Alert found, no calculation possible

steps.name: Siemplify_Case Tag
steps.description: Add given tag to the case the current alert is grouped to

steps.name: TemplateEngine_Render Template
steps.description: This action will render a Jinja2 template using a JSON input.

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"JSON Object":"{}","Jinja":"{% set roundup = 15 %}\n{% set casemins = [Round Results.ScriptResult] %}\n{{ casemins + roundup - (casemins % roundup) }}","Include Case Data":false,"Template":"{\"Content\":\"\",\"ContentTemplateName\":\"\",\"HtmlTemplateName\":\"\"}"}

parameters.name: NestedWorkflowOutput
parameters.value: "alerts.startTimeUnixTimeInMs" is not mapped (i.e. value 0), no calculation is possible

steps.name: Functions_Math Arithmetic
steps.description:
A set of built in math operators:
Plus - returns a result for the sum of 2 arguments
Sub - returns a result for 1 argument minus the other
Multi - returns a result for 1 argument multiplied by the other
Div - returns a result for 1 argument divided by the other
Mod - returns the result of the percentage between 2 arguments

parameters.name: ScriptParametersEntityFields
parameters.value: {"Function":"Sub","Arg 2":"[Get Case Data.JsonResult| \"alerts.startTimeUnixTimeInMs\" | first(1)]","Arg 1":"[Get Case Data.JsonResult| \"alerts.startTimeUnixTimeInMs\" | last(1)]"}
